title: Social media limits are coming for teens across Europe
summary: The EU is considering sweeping restrictions on teens' social media access, including age limits and potential outright bans, requiring platforms to prove their services are not harmful before minors can use them. EU Commission President Ursula von der Leyen indicated new legislation could be proposed within months, marking a major regulatory shift toward protecting young people from social media platforms.
content:
The European Union is weighing sweeping new restrictions on children's and teenagers' access to social media, including age limits, an outright ban, and phased access. Social media platforms could also be forced to prove their services are not harmful before young people are allowed to use them.
European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said the bloc's executive arm could propose new legislation within months, after reviewing recommendations from a panel of experts released today. "This is not about whether children can access social media. It is about when social media can access our children," von der Leyen said. 
The panel reco …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 欧洲即将对青少年的社交媒体使用进行限制
zh.summary: 欧盟正在考虑对青少年的社交媒体使用进行全面限制,包括年龄限制和潜在的全面禁令,要求平台在未成年人使用其服务前证明其服务无害。欧盟委员会主席乌苏拉·冯德莱恩表示,新立法可能在数月内提出,标志着在保护年轻人免受社交媒体平台影响方面迈出重大监管转变。

title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
summary: Google is integrating its Gemini AI assistant into Waze to enhance trip personalization through conversational voice commands for reporting traffic incidents and map updates. The update introduces new features like Destination Search, enabling drivers to find nearby locations using natural language requests while maintaining focus on driving.
content:
Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more. 
Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze says its updating its conversation reporting feature, first introduced in 2024, to allow drivers to use conversational voice commands to report traffic incidents and suggest map updates, like a road closure or outdated house number. In addition, Waze introduced Destination Search, enabling drivers to use (again) use conversation voice commands (e.g., "Find me a coffee shop that's open …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Waze 将推出多项新的人工智能功能
zh.summary: 谷歌正在将其Gemini AI助手集成到Waze中,以通过对话式语音命令报告交通事件和地图更新来增强行程个性化。该更新引入了目的地搜索等新功能,使驾驶员能够使用自然语言请求查找附近的位置,同时保持对驾驶的专注。
